creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I noticed this problem today:

py39-pyzipper-0.3.5 conflicts with py39-scapy-2.5.0 on /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/test/__init__.py

I just fixed devel/py-pyzipper with 2540270e7a5e7b5cab004d38b2b9f4a52f53b428

I'm creating this in the hopes that net/scapy can be fixed too.

Thank you.
